assertions.assertion: Client uses GrantTypes.ClientCredentials as the allowed grant type
assertions.rationale: Response clearly shows AllowedGrantTypes = GrantTypes.ClientCredentials in the client definition.
AllowedScopes = { "invoices.read", "invoices.pay" } is present in the client definition.
Both new ApiScope("invoices.read", ...) and new ApiScope("invoices.pay", ...) are defined in the ApiScopes collection.

assertions.assertion: Secret is loaded from Configuration or an external source — not a hardcoded string with Sha256()
assertions.rationale: Secret is loaded via configuration["BillingService:ClientSecretHash"] — no .Sha256() on a hardcoded string.
